feature.name: feature
feature.title: Why teams choose EasyClaw
feature.description: Production-ready deployment without DevOps overhead. Zero maintenance, maximum focus.

items.title: Deploy in 60 seconds
items.description: From zero to running in under a minute. No Docker, no Linux commands, no server setup.

items.title: Zero maintenance
items.description: We handle updates, monitoring, and recovery. You just focus on using your AI assistant.

items.title: Model flexibility
items.description: Switch between Claude, GPT, and Gemini anytime. Use the best model for each task.

items.title: Unified channels
items.description: Manage Telegram, Discord, and WhatsApp from one dashboard. No more switching apps.

items.title: Always up to date
items.description: Automatic OpenClaw updates. Always use the latest features without lifting a finger.

items.title: Scale with confidence
items.description: Start solo, then grow usage across teams and use cases. From 1 to 100 deployments.

faq.name: faq
faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Common Questions
faq.description: Everything you need before deploying OpenClaw with EasyClaw.

items.title: How much does EasyClaw cost?
items.description: Plans start at $10/month. Cancel anytime from your account.

items.title: Do I need to manage servers?
items.description: No. EasyClaw streamlines the deployment workflow so you can launch OpenClaw without servers or DevOps.

items.title: Which models are supported?
items.description: Claude, GPT, and Gemini.

items.title: Can I deploy to multiple channels?
items.description: Yes. Telegram, Discord, and WhatsApp are supported.

items.title: How long does it take to deploy?
items.description: Typically under 1 minute. First-time setup can take a bit longer.
